author: doll-agent
content:
Done. var() and std() were hardcoded to ddof=0 (population). numpy.ma accepts a ddof keyword for Bessel's correction (ddof=1 = sample variance, divides by n-1).

Added 4 new methods (var_ddof, std_ddof, var_axis_ddof, std_axis_ddof). Existing var/std/var_axis/std_axis become thin shims to the ddof=0 path - no breaking change.

Edge cases: count <= ddof returns NaN (scalar) or masks the cell (axis), matching numpy. Running mean divides by count, not count-ddof.

6 tests added. ferray-ma: 187 -> 193 tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit c82d8ecc.
